lines.en_lit: Rav Pappa: What he stuck the handful onto the side of the vessel? we require inside the vessel, and that is Or perhaps we require placed properly inside and that is not Let it stand

Mar bar Rav Ashi raised dilemma: What overturned the vessel and stuck handful to the underside of the vessel? we require inside and that is or perhaps we require placed properly and that is not Let it stand
Rav Pappa raised a dilemma: the handfuls to which referred smoothed or overflowing? Rabbi Abba said to Rav Ashi: Come hear The handfuls to which referred neither smoothed nor overflowing, but full,
We learned there, the blood spilled on the floor and collected it it is disqualified, from the vessel onto the floor, and collected it it is valid.
From where are these matters As the Sages taught “And shall take from the blood of the bull” from the blood of the soul, and not from the blood of the skin, nor from the blood squeezed

“from the blood of the bull,” Blood from the bull, receive it For if it should enter your mind “from the blood of the bull,” and even some of the blood, didn’t Rav Yehuda say: He who receives must receive all of the blood of bull, as it is stated: “And all the blood of the bull he shall pour out on the base of the altar”
Rather, learn from this what is “From the blood of the bull”? receive blood from the bull. And maintains subtract and add and interpret homiletically,

Rav Pappa raised a dilemma What the incense from his handfuls scattered? his hand considered like the neck of the animal, and disqualified? Or perhaps is considered like a vessel used in the Temple service, and it is not disqualified. Let it stand

Rav Pappa raised dilemma: What thought during the taking of the handful of the incense, Do we say is derived “handfuls” “handfuls,” from a meal-offering, Just as there, thought is effective it, so too thought is effective it? Or not

Rav Shimi bar Ashi said to Rav Pappa: Come hear Rabbi Akiva added the handful and the incense, and the frankincense, and the coals that if one who immersed himself during the day touched part of them, he disqualifies all of them.
It enters your mind from one who immersed himself during the day disqualifies leaving likewise disqualifies and from leaving disqualifies thought likewise disqualifies
